targets.name: Girls That Invest
targets.notes: Sim & Sonya. Podcast + community. Lead with: female traders already know decisions are cyclical — this is the professional trading application of that.

targets.name: Her First $100K
targets.notes: Tori Dunlap. Largest female finance audience online. Lead with: most trading tools built for how men trade — this one is built for how women actually make decisions.

targets.name: Wealth Witch
targets.notes: Astrology x wealth. Exact positioning overlap. Will immediately understand and want a demo.

targets.name: Aligned Trader
targets.notes: Astrology x markets crossover. Audience already assembled and primed for this product.

targets.name: Human Design for Business
targets.notes: Will immediately understand the product. Lead with: this is the trading application of HD the community has been missing.

targets.name: Financial Femme
targets.notes: Female finance educator. HD-aware audience. Strong conversion potential.

targets.name: Women of Crypto
targets.notes: Female crypto community, global. Perfect B2B licensing target.

targets.name: She's Investing It
targets.notes: Female investor + crypto educator. Growing fast. Strong community trust.

targets.name: Cosmic Trading
targets.notes: Direct overlap. Already combines astrology and trading. Perfect founding partner candidate.

targets.name: Elle of Trades
targets.notes: Female trading educator, options + equities. Professional audience.

targets.name: Wealth With Soph
targets.notes: Crypto-focused female educator. Direct product overlap.

targets.name: Female Bitcoiner
targets.notes: BTC-focused female community. High conviction audience.

targets.name: Women Who Invest
targets.notes: Female investing platform + community. Good B2B licensing target.

targets.name: Evolutionary Astrology Business
targets.notes: Business/finance astrology. Premium audience, high spend.

targets.name: Trading With Kimothy
targets.notes: Female trading educator, stocks + options.

targets.name: Femme Trader
targets.notes: Female trader education + community. Core target audience.

targets.name: Invest With Vest
targets.notes: Female-led investing education.

targets.name: HD Trader
targets.notes: HD x trading niche. Audience already understands the full framework.

targets.name: Wolf of Trading
targets.notes: Large audience. Adjust pitch toward female members who already think cyclically.

targets.name: Bitcoin Bullets
targets.notes: Large crypto community. Secondary target — lead female-focused first.
